name: add-agent-role-variant
task: Create a new 'fact-checker' agent that verifies claims by cross-referencing multiple data sources. It should have access to all 17 data tools plus query_data, use GLM-5, 25 turns, $0.50 budget, 6 minutes wall clock.
assertions: A 'fact-checker' entry is added to BUDGETS with turns: 25, costUsd: 0.50, wallClockMs: 360000
The getToolNamesForRole() function returns all 17 data tool names plus 'query_data' for the 'fact-checker' role
A new sub-agent file is created at electron/agents/sub-agents/fact-checker.ts with a factory function and a runner function
The sub-agent file uses dynamic import() or pi-imports.ts helper for Pi packages (never static import for pi-ai runtime)
The runner function calls attachSafetyLimits() from safety-limits.ts to enforce the budget
